title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: LA GRANDE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. Youth internship and advocacy support, and youth adult partnership training and coaching. 708 K Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: La Grande and Union School District students and staff Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-3pm (541) 663-3330 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 663-3330 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Union County Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA GRANDE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
